stemHtml:
Which of the following factors enhance the visibility of ground features during a low-level navigation?

1. The presence of sea spray when looking towards land
2. An approach to a feature with the moon behind you
3. Blowing smoke between you and the object
4. An approach to an object down sun
5. High contrast between a feature and its background
6. A low-angle slant range
7. A clean windscreen and windows
